name: Christian Garros
abstract: Christian Garros (February 17, 1920, in Paris – August 23, 1988, in Rouen) was a French jazz drummer and bandleader. Garros began playing professionally shortly after the end of World War II, working with Django Reinhardt and Jacques Hélian.

about_quotes.speaker: Percy Heath
about_quotes.evidence: Christian Garros was the drummer. They were the trio. Miles played with that trio, and Lester played with that trio, rhythm section.
about_quotes.doc_title: Percy Heath — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
